title: Comcast, Classiq and AMD Demonstrate Quantum Algorithm for More Resilient and Reliable Internet
why:
- A joint trial by Comcast, Classiq, and AMD applied quantum algorithms to improve network routing resilience for internet delivery, demonstrating practical and scalable solutions for real-world network challenges.
- The trial focused on identifying independent backup paths for network sites during maintenance, ensuring network traffic can be rerouted seamlessly without disruption even during simultaneous site failures.
- Quantum techniques, combined with high-performance classical computing using AMD Instinct™ GPUs, were used to find unique backup paths in real-time, addressing exponentially complex combinatorial optimization problems.
- The project included both quantum hardware executions and GPU-accelerated simulations, enabling rapid iteration and validation of quantum algorithms beyond current quantum hardware capacity.
- The trial demonstrates that quantum computing can address network optimization tasks that are computationally intensive for classical computers, highlighting its emerging practical application in telecommunications.
